LanguageData.WVC_IsDuplcateDesc: Whether this pawn is a duplicate of another pawn. Duplicates are bonded to their originals and because of this have some nasty limitations. They can't use some genes, and some effects that affect the original can also affect them.
LanguageData.WVC_IsResurrectedDesc: Whether this pawn is ever resurrected. This could happen off-screen or right before your eyes. Either way, it matters mostly for ideology and, more rarely, for genetics.
LanguageData.WVC_HivemindPsychicSensitivityDesc: The hivemind's overall psy-sensitivity. All hivemind pawns influence this. Psy-deaf pawns also contribute to this, significantly reducing sensitivity. This affects the overall isolation of the hivemind and strengthens or weakens certain genes.
